title: VRP Response
description: Standard response format for the v:// Resolution Protocol (VRP) v1.

type.description: The type of the resolved resource (e.g., achievement_utxo, genesis_utxo, executor).

payload.description: The actual content of the resource.

proof_hash.description: The SHA256 proof hash of the payload, as stored in the resolver's database.

anchor.description: The Layer 0 blockchain anchor information for the proof_hash.

tx_hash.description: The transaction hash of the anchor.

block.description: The block number containing the anchor transaction.

confirmed_at.description: The timestamp when the anchor was confirmed.

resolver.description: The v:// address of the resolver node that provided this response.

ttl.description: Suggested time-to-live for caching this response, in seconds.
